message:
feat: add lazy recovery for WebSocket connections

WebSockets can die during long sessions. This adds automatic
reconnection when page_ws or browser_ws is detected dead:

- isPageWsAlive() / isBrowserWsAlive() check running state
- ensurePageWsConnected() / ensureBrowserWsConnected() trigger recovery
- reconnectBrowserWebSocket() handles browser domain re-enablement
- All send functions and nextEvent() use lazy recovery

Pipe transport has NO recovery (fail fast) - if Chrome pipe dies,
the session is unrecoverable anyway.
